meta.title: ICSsec Awards: Last SCADA Diva and First Beer ISAC Community Builder Award
meta.description:
Dale Peterson interviews Ron Fabela, Patrick Miller, Bryan Owen and Chris Sistrunk in the S4x20 Green Room. They discuss: 
- Patrick Miller's win, and the subsequent retirement, of the SCADA Diva award.
- The first Beer ISAC Community Builder award being given to the ICS Village
- And what the Beer ISAC is and isn't
